_script.desc: The code associated with this object.

Height.desc: Get or set the height of the form.

Width.desc: Get or set the width of the form.

Top.desc: Get or set the top of the form.

Left.desc: Get or set the left of the form.

_background.desc: Color of background. Can be name, #RRGGBB, rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_backgroundimage.desc: Background image. Enter none for no image. Do not put your files into /nsb. Enter nsb/images/backgroundStripes.png for a vertical pinstripe pattern.  Gradients are allowed - see Wiki.

_setFocusID.desc: ID of control to set initial focus to.

_locked.desc: Lock the controls on the form.

_openMode.desc: If True, this form will be shown at startup, along with the firstform.

_fullScreen.desc:
How will the form be displayed?

Full Screen using full width and height.
Actual Size of width, height, left and top. Use for Modal forms.
Center in screen, using width and height.
Zoom width and height to screen size and center horizontally. Max of 2.
noStyle Only user styling applied to form.

More Info....

_modal.desc: Does form float over other forms? Modal forms need screenMode set to 'actual'

_top.desc: Form top. Can be in pixels, percent or auto. Ignored unless screenMode is 'fullScreen'.

_left.desc: Form left. Can be in pixels, percent or auto. Ignored unless screenMode is 'fullScreen'.

_width.desc: Form width. Can be in pixels, percent or auto. Ignored unless screenMode is 'fullScreen'.

_height.desc: Form height. Can be in pixels, percent or auto. Ignored unless screenMode is 'fullScreen'.

_designWidth.desc: The width of the screen the form will be displayed on at Design Time. If 0, same as form width. Not used at runtime.

_designHeight.desc: The height of the screen the form will be displayed on at Design Time. If 0, same as form height. Not used at runtime.

_onkeypress.desc: key tapped in field on form. Takes one argument, an event block.

_onhide.desc: Called when ChangeForm function is used.

_onshow.desc: Called when ChangeForm function is used.

_onresize.desc: Control resized due to parent size changing.

_parentForm.desc: Parent for this form. Will be added to that form.

_theme.desc: Set the jQuery Mobile color theme for the project (including background color). Can be a-z. a is white, b is black, and others custom. Leave empty to default to project theme. jQuery Mobile only.

_HTML.desc: HTML for Form. Placed before any controls.

_htmltemplate: <div id="{id}" {if theme<>''}data-theme="{theme}" {/if}{attributes} class="nsb-form{if modal=='true'} jqmodal{/if} {class}" style="display:{openMode}; {if background<>''}background-color:{background}; {/if}{if backgroundimage<>'' and backgroundimage[:16]=='linear-gradient('}background-image:{backgroundimage};{/if}{if backgroundimage<>'' and backgroundimage[:16]<>'linear-gradient('}background-image:url('{backgroundimage}');{/if}{if borderWidth.isdigit()}border-width:{borderWidth!p}; border-style:{borderStyle}; border-color:{borderColor}; {/if}{if borderWidth<>''}box-sizing:border-box; {/if}{if fullScreen<>'nostyle'} position:{position};  height: {if fullScreen<>'true'}{height!p}; {/if}{if fullScreen=='true'}100vh; {/if}top:{top!p}; left:{left!p}; width:{if fullScreen<>'true'}{width!p}; {/if}{if fullScreen=='true'}100%; {/if}{/if}{style!j}">
